title: Arachnothryx inconstans
taxonomy: Arachnothryx inconstans is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to Central America. The classification of Arachnothryx inconstans is within the genus Arachnothryx and the family Rubiaceae. The plant is further classified as belonging to the order Gentianales. The classification of Arachnothryx inconstans is also sometimes listed as part of the subfamily Cinchonoideae.

intro: Arachnothryx inconstans, also known as spider-limbed shrub, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can aid in reducing pain and inflammation. The bioactive constituents of Arachnothryx inconstans include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
